eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CHILD ABDUCTION EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Texas; at 6:33 PM on JUL 9, 2026 Effective until 9:33 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
AMBER Alert: Child Abduction from San Antonio, Texas. Missing child is Ozana Cisneros, 7 month old black female. Suspect is Maximina Cisneros 19 year old white female. Call San Antonio Police Department with information. If seen call 9 1 1. AMBER Alert: Child Abduction from San Antonio, Texas. Missing child is Ozana Cisneros, 7 month old black female. Suspect is Maximina Cisneros 19 year old white female. Call San Antonio Police Department with information. If seen call 9 1 1..
